title: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple
description: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple is an upcoming post-apocalyptic horror film directed by Nia DaCosta and written by Alex Garland.[2] It was shot back-to-back with its predecessor 28 Years Later (2025), and serves as the fourth installment overall in the 28 Days Later film series. The film stars Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Jack O'Connell, and Cillian Murphy.
produced_by: Danny Boyle, Alex Garland, Andrew Macdonald, Peter Rice, Bernie Bellew
starring: Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Jack O'Connell, Cillian Murphy

title: Animal Friends
description: Animal Friends is an upcoming American live action animated road film directed by Peter Atencio, and written by Kevin Burrows and Matt Mider. The film stars Ryan Reynolds, Jason Momoa, Vince Vaughn, Eric André, Addison Rae, Ellie Bamber, Rob Delaney, Lil Rel Howery, Dan Levy, and Aubrey Plaza.
produced_by: Cale Boyter, Peter Atencio
starring: Ryan Reynolds, Jason Momoa, Vince Vaughn, Eric André, Addison Rae, Ellie Bamber, Rob Delaney, Lil Rel Howery, Dan Levy, Aubrey Plaza

title: Avengers: Doomsday
description: Avengers: Doomsday is an upcoming American superhero film based on the Marvel Comics superhero team the Avengers. Produced by Marvel Studios and AGBO, and distributed by Walt Disney Studios Motion Pictures, it is intended to be the fifth installment in the Avengers film series following Avengers: Endgame (2019) and the 39th film in the Marvel Cinematic Universe (MCU). Directed by Anthony and Joe Russo and written by Michael Waldron and Stephen McFeely, the film features an ensemble cast including Chris Hemsworth, Vanessa Kirby, Anthony Mackie, Sebastian Stan, Letitia Wright, Paul Rudd, Wyatt Russell, Tenoch Huerta Mejía, Ebon Moss-Bachrach, Simu Liu, Florence Pugh, Kelsey Grammer, Lewis Pullman, Danny Ramirez, Joseph Quinn, David Harbour, Winston Duke, Hannah John-Kamen, Tom Hiddleston, Patrick Stewart, Ian McKellen, Alan Cumming, Rebecca Romijn, James Marsden, Channing Tatum, Pedro Pascal, and Robert Downey Jr. In the film, the Avengers, Wakandans, Fantastic Four, New Avengers, and the X-Men team up to face Doctor Doom (Downey).
produced_by: Kevin Feige, Anthony Russo, Joe Russo
starring: Chris Hemsworth, Vanessa Kirby, Anthony Mackie, Sebastian Stan, Letitia Wright, Paul Rudd, Wyatt Russell, Tenoch Huerta Mejía, Ebon Moss-Bachrach, Simu Liu, Florence Pugh, Kelsey Grammer, Lewis Pullman, Danny Ramirez, Joseph Quinn, David Harbour, Winston Duke, Hannah John-Kamen, Tom Hiddleston, Patrick Stewart, Ian McKellen, Alan Cumming, Rebecca Romijn, James Marsden, Channing Tatum, Pedro Pascal, Robert Downey Jr.

title: Bitter Christmas
description: Bitter Christmas (Spanish: Amarga Navidad) is an upcoming Spanish comedy film directed by Pedro Almodóvar. Its cast features Bárbara Lennie, Victoria Luengo, Quim Gutiérrez, Leonardo Sbaraglia, Patrick Criado, Aitana Sánchez-Gijón, and Milena Smit.
starring: Bárbara Lennie, Victoria Luengo, Quim Gutiérrez, Leonardo Sbaraglia, Patrick Criado, Aitana Sánchez-Gijón, Milena Smit

title: The Bride!
description: The Bride! is an upcoming American monster film written, directed, and produced by Maggie Gyllenhaal and starring Jessie Buckley, Christian Bale, Penélope Cruz, Peter Sarsgaard, and Annette Bening. The film draws inspiration from James Whale's 1935 film Bride of Frankenstein, itself adapted from Mary Shelley's 1818 novel Frankenstein.
produced_by: Maggie Gyllenhaal, Osnat Handelsman-Keren, Talia Kleinhendler, Emma Tillinger Koskoff
starring: Jessie Buckley, Christian Bale, Penélope Cruz, Peter Sarsgaard, Julianne Hough, John Magaro, Annette Bening, Jake Gyllenhaal

title: Coyote vs. Acme
description: Coyote vs. Acme is an upcoming American live-action animated legal comedy film directed by Dave Green with a screenplay by Samy Burch from a story by Burch, James Gunn, and Jeremy Slater.[1] The film is based on the 1990 The New Yorker magazine article "Coyote v. Acme" by Ian Frazier, which itself is based on the cartoon character Wile E. Coyote and the Acme Corporation from the Looney Tunes and Merrie Melodies series of cartoons. The film's cast includes John Cena, Will Forte, Lana Condor, P. J. Byrne, Tone Bell, Martha Kelly, and the voice of Eric Bauza.
produced_by: James Gunn, Chris DeFaria
starring: Will Forte, John Cena, Lana Condor, P. J. Byrne, Tone Bell, Martha Kelly, Eric Bauza

title: Crime 101
description: Crime 101 is an upcoming crime film directed by Bart Layton, who co-wrote the screenplay with Peter Straughan. It is an adaptation of the Don Winslow novella Crime 101 and stars Chris Hemsworth, Mark Ruffalo, Barry Keoghan, Halle Berry and Monica Barbaro.
produced_by: Chris Hemsworth, Ben Grayson, Bart Layton, Eric Fellner, Tim Bevan, Dimitri Doganis, Derrin Schlesinger, Shane Salerno
starring: Chris Hemsworth, Mark Ruffalo, Barry Keoghan, Halle Berry, Monica Barbaro, Corey Hawkins, Tate Donovan, Devon Bostick, Jennifer Jason Leigh, Nick Nolte

title: The Dog Stars
description: The Dog Stars is an upcoming post-apocalyptic science fiction film directed by Ridley Scott, and written by Mark L. Smith and Christopher Wilkinson, based on the 2012 novel by Peter Heller.
produced_by: Ridley Scott, Michael Pruss, Cliff Roberts, Mark L. Smith
starring: Jacob Elordi, Margaret Qualley, Josh Brolin, Guy Pearce, Benedict Wong

title: Flowervale Street
description: Flowervale Street is scheduled to be released by Warner Bros. Pictures in the United States on August 14, 2026.
produced_by: David Robert Mitchell, J. J. Abrams, Hannah Minghella, Matt Jackson, Tommy Harper
starring: Anne Hathaway, Ewan McGregor, Maisy Stella, Christian Convery

title: Girls und Panzer: Motto Love Love Sakusen Desu!
description: A film adaptation of the manga was announced in March 2025, with Shimoda, Usui, and Kimura joining the project, and the reveal of other staff members who would serve as original character designers, chief animation directors, and composer. That month, Mai Fuchigami,  Ai Kayano, Mami Ozaki, Ikumi Nakagami, and Yuka Iguchi were set to reprise their voice roles from the franchise.

title: Goat
description: Goat is an upcoming American animated sports comedy film produced by Columbia Pictures and Sony Pictures Animation in association with Unanimous Media and Modern Magic, and distributed by Sony Pictures Releasing. It is directed by Tyree Dillihay (in his feature directorial debut), co-directed by Adam Rosette, and written by Aaron Buchsbaum and Teddy Riley. The film stars the voice talents of Caleb McLaughlin in the title role, Gabrielle Union, Nick Kroll, Nicola Coughlan, David Harbour, Stephen Curry (who also serves a producer), Jenifer Lewis, and Patton Oswalt, and follows an animal of the same name who joins a basketball league in order to become the greatest of all time.
produced_by: Stephen Curry, Erick Peyton, Michelle Raimo Kouyate, Adam Rosenberg, Rodney Rothman
starring: Caleb McLaughlin, Gabrielle Union, Nick Kroll, Nicola Coughlan, David Harbour, Stephen Curry, Jenifer Lewis, Patton Oswalt

title: Gummibär & Friends: Operation Cotton Candy
description: The film centers on the titular character Gummibär, an anthropomorphic green gummy bear alongside a group of two friends named Kala, a blue cat who is a master of martial arts, and Harry, a green chameleon who studies science. They are recruited by a Covert Government Agency to defeat a set of nefarious villains who are led by Dr. Verde, the antagonist who is determined to erase the color green from the planet, while Gummy thinks he is merely testing cotton candy flavors.[2][3]
produced_by: P. Jayakumar, Paul Cummins

title: Guru
description: Guru (French: Gourou) is an upcoming 2026 French psychological thriller film directed by Yann Gozlan, from a screenplay he wrote with Jean-Baptiste-Delafon. The film stars Pierre Niney as a charismatic and manipulative self-help guru. The supporting cast includes Marion Barbeau, Anthony Bajon and Holt McCallany. It is a co-production between France and Belgium.
produced_by: Wassim Beji
starring: Pierre Niney

title: Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
description: Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai (transl. If It's Youth, Then Love Has to Happen; shortened as HJTIHH) is an upcoming Indian Hindi-language romantic comedy film[1] directed by David Dhawan and produced by Tips Films. Based on an original story by Dhawan, the film stars Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur and Pooja Hegde in the lead roles.
produced_by: Ramesh Taurani
starring: Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur, Pooja Hegde

title: I Can Only Imagine 2
description: I Can Only Imagine 2 is scheduled to be released in the United States by Lionsgate on February 20, 2026.
produced_by: Cindy Bond, Kevin Downes, Bart Millard, Daryl Lefever, Joshua Walsh
starring: John Michael Finley, Milo Ventimiglia, Trace Adkins, Dennis Quaid, Sophie Skelton, Arielle Kebbel, Joshua Bassett, Sammy Dell

title: Ice Age 6
description: Ice Age 6 is an upcoming American animated adventure comedy film produced by 20th Century Animation and distributed by 20th Century Studios. It will serve as a sequel to Ice Age: Collision Course (2016), the sixth main installment and seventh overall installment in the Ice Age film series. Ray Romano, John Leguizamo, Denis Leary, Simon Pegg, and Queen Latifah will reprise their roles from the previous films. It will be the first theatrical Ice Age film not to be produced by Blue Sky Studios, following its closure on April 10, 2021.
produced_by: Lori Forte, [, 1, ]
starring: Ray Romano, John Leguizamo, Denis Leary, Queen Latifah, Simon Pegg

title: Incidents Around the House
description: Incidents Around the House is an upcoming American supernatural horror film directed by Rob Savage and written by Nathan Elston. It is based on the 2024 novel by Josh Malerman. It stars Jessica Chastain and Jay Duplass. James Wan serves as a producer through his Atomic Monster banner.
produced_by: James Wan
starring: Jessica Chastain, Jay Duplass

title: Jana Nayagan
description: Jana Nayagan (transl. People's Hero) is an upcoming Indian Tamil-language political action thriller film[4] directed by H. Vinoth and produced by KVN Productions. The film stars Vijay, Pooja Hegde and Bobby Deol in the lead roles, alongside Gautham Vasudev Menon, Prakash Raj, Narain, Priyamani, Shruti Haasan, Mamitha Baiju, Monisha Blessy and Varalaxmi Sarathkumar. It is intended to be the final film appearance of Vijay before his entry into politics, as well as KVN's first Tamil language production.
produced_by: Venkat K. Narayana, Jagadish Palanisamy, Lohith N. K.
starring: Vijay, Pooja Hegde, Bobby Deol

title: Kanchana 4
description: Kanchana 4 (marketed as Muni 5: Kanchana 4) is an upcoming Indian Tamil-language comedy horror film co-produced, written and directed by Raghava Lawrence. Produced by Goldmines Telefilms, it is the fifth instalment in the Muni film series. The film stars Lawrence, Pooja Hegde and Nora Fatehi.
produced_by: Manish Shah, Raghava Lawrence
starring: Raghava Lawrence, Pooja Hegde, Nora Fatehi

title: Karma
description: Karma is an upcoming 2026 French psychological thriller film directed by Guillaume Canet from a screenplay he co-wrote with Simon Jacquet, starring Marion Cotillard, Leonardo Sbaraglia, Luis Zahera and Denis Ménochet. The film will be released theatrically in France by Pathé on 21 October 2026.
starring: Marion Cotillard, Leonardo Sbaraglia, Luis Zahera, Denis Ménochet

title: The Last Resort
description: The Last Resort is an upcoming Philippine romantic comedy film directed by Donald Petrie and written by Karen McCullah. It stars Daisy Ridley and Alden Ehrenreich. This is the first Filipino-produced Hollywood film.
produced_by: Ernesto Sta. Maria Jr., Raja Collins
starring: Daisy Ridley, Alden Ehrenreich

title: The Legend of Aang: The Last Airbender

It serves as a continuation of the Nickelodeon animated television series Avatar: The Last Airbender (2005–2008), as well as the first production of Avatar Studios. The film stars the voices of Dave Bautista, Eric Nam, Dionne Quan, Jessica Matten, Román Zaragoza, and Steven Yeun, and will follow the series' main cast in their young adult years.
produced_by: Maryann Garger, Latifa Ouaou, Bryan Konietzko, Michael Dante DiMartino
starring: Dave Bautista, Eric Nam, Dionne Quan, Jessica Matten, Román Zaragoza, Steven Yeun

title: The Mandalorian and Grogu
description: The Mandalorian and Grogu is an upcoming American film directed by Jon Favreau and co-written by Favreau and Dave Filoni. Produced by Lucasfilm and set to be distributed by Walt Disney Studios Motion Pictures, it is part of the Star Wars franchise and a continuation of the Disney+ television series The Mandalorian (2019–2023). The film stars Pedro Pascal as Din Djarin / The Mandalorian, alongside Sigourney Weaver, Jeremy Allen White, and Jonny Coyne.
produced_by: Kathleen Kennedy, Jon Favreau, Dave Filoni, Ian Bryce
starring: Pedro Pascal, Sigourney Weaver, Jeremy Allen White, Jonny Coyne

description: Masters of the Universe is an upcoming American superhero film based on Mattel's franchise of the same name. The film is directed by Travis Knight, from a script by Chris Butler. It stars Nicholas Galitzine as Prince Adam / He-Man, a man who returns to his home planet Eternia to save it from the evil forces of Skeletor, played by Jared Leto. Camila Mendes, Alison Brie, Idris Elba, Morena Baccarin, Jóhannes Haukur Jóhannesson, Sasheer Zamata, James Purefoy, and Charlotte Riley also star.

Directed by Antoine Fuqua and written by John Logan, the film stars Jaafar Jackson, Jackson's nephew, in his film debut as Michael Jackson. The ensemble cast also features Colman Domingo, Nia Long, Miles Teller, Laura Harrier, Kat Graham, Larenz Tate, and Derek Luke.

starring: Jaafar Jackson, Colman Domingo, Nia Long, Miles Teller, Laura Harrier, Kat Graham, Larenz Tate, Derek Luke

The film is a live-action adaptation of Disney's 2016 animated film Moana, and the third installment in the Moana franchise. starring: Jason Statham, Annabelle Wallis, Roland Møller, Jason Wong

description: The film was officially announced on 22 April 2025, and scheduled to be released on 14 August 2026.[5]

The film stars Matt Damon as Odysseus, the Ancient Greek king of Ithaca, and follows his journey home after the Trojan War to reunite with his wife, Penelope. The ensemble cast also features Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Zendaya, Lupita Nyong'o, Robert Pattinson, and Charlize Theron.
produced_by: Emma Thomas, Christopher Nolan

title: Parasakthi
description: Parasakthi (transl. The Supreme Power) is an upcoming Indian Tamil-language political period drama film[a] directed by Sudha Kongara and produced by Dawn Pictures. The film stars Sivakarthikeyan, Ravi Mohan, Atharvaa and Sreeleela (in her Tamil debut) in the lead roles, alongside Dev Ramnath, Prithvi Rajan, Guru Somasundaram, Basil Joseph, Ranjan Ramanayake and Papri Ghosh. Based on true events, the story revolves around the Anti-Hindi agitations in Tamil Nadu that happened in 1965.

Produced by Spin Master Entertainment, it is the sequel to Paw Patrol: The Movie (2021) and Paw Patrol: The Mighty Movie (2023) and is being directed by Cal Brunker, who co-wrote the screenplay with Bob Barlen. The ensemble voice cast includes Mckenna Grace (voicing Skye), Ron Pardo (voicing both Cap’n Turbot and Mayor Humdinger), Jennifer Hudson, Fortune Feimster, Snoop Dogg, Bill Nye, Meredith MacNeill, Paris Hilton, Terry Crews, and Jameela Jamil.

Jackson, and David Arquette reprising their roles from previous films, along with Isabel May and Joel McHale.

The sequel to Shrek Forever After (2010), it serves as the fifth main installment and the seventh overall installment in the Shrek film series. The film is directed by Walt Dohrn and Conrad Vernon and co-directed by Brad Ableson from a screenplay written by Michael McCullers, and produced by Illumination CEO Chris Meledandri and Gina Shay. Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy, and Cameron Diaz will reprise their respective voice roles as the title character, Donkey, and Princess Fiona from the previous films, with Zendaya joining the cast.

A spin-off to M3GAN (2022), the plot will follow a man who buys an android to cope with the death of his wife. It stars Lily Sullivan, David Rysdahl, Claudia Doumit and Oliver Cooper. Tom Hanks and Tim Allen are set to reprise their respective roles of Woody and Buzz Lightyear from the first four films, with Anna Faris, Ernie Hudson, and Conan O'Brien joining the cast.

title: West Side Story
description: Steven Spielberg is directing an upcoming American science fiction film from a screenplay by David Koepp based on a story by Spielberg.[1] The film stars Emily Blunt, Josh O'Connor, Colin Firth, Eve Hewson, Wyatt Russell and Colman Domingo. The film is scheduled to be released in the United States by Universal Pictures on June 12, 2026.
produced_by: Kristie Macosko Krieger, Steven Spielberg
starring: Emily Blunt, Josh O'Connor, Colin Firth, Eve Hewson, Wyatt Russell, Colman Domingo

title: Team America: World Police
description: Trey Parker is directing a comedy film from a screenplay by Vernon Chatman. It is co-produced by Parker and longtime creative collaborator Matt Stone through Park County, along with Kendrick Lamar and Dave Free through PGLang. It is Parker's first film as director since Team America: World Police (2004).
produced_by: Trey Parker, Matt Stone, Kendrick Lamar, Dave Free

title: Verity
description: Verity is scheduled to be released in the United States on May 15, 2026 by Amazon MGM Studios through Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer.
produced_by: Nick Antosca, Alex Hedlund, Michael Showalter, Jordana Mollick, Anne Hathaway, Colleen Hoover, Stacey Sher
starring: Anne Hathaway, Josh Hartnett, Dakota Johnson

title: White
description: The film is described as a "global thriller" that explores the impact of Indian spiritual philosophy on global peace-building. It highlights how ancient wisdom, particularly Sri Sri Ravi Shankar's teachings, contributed to brokering peace in a country still healing from a brutal conflict. The story is presented as an untold chapter of modern peace-building, emphasizing the positive impact of spiritual guidance and non-violent dialogue.[5]
produced_by: Siddharth Anand, Mahaveer Jain
starring: Vikrant Massey, Jaideep Ahlawat, Nikita Dutta

title: Wildwood
description: Wildwood is an upcoming American animated dark fantasy film produced by Laika and based on Colin Meloy's 2011 novel illustrated by Carson Ellis. Directed by Travis Knight and written by Chris Butler, the film features an ensemble voice cast of Peyton Elizabeth Lee, Jacob Tremblay, Carey Mulligan, Mahershala Ali, Awkwafina, Angela Bassett, Jake Johnson, Charlie Day, Amandla Stenberg, Jemaine Clement, Maya Erskine, Tantoo Cardinal, Tom Waits, and Richard E. Grant.
produced_by: Arianne Sutner, Travis Knight
starring: Peyton Elizabeth Lee, Jacob Tremblay, Carey Mulligan, Mahershala Ali, Awkwafina, Angela Bassett, Jake Johnson, Charlie Day, Amandla Stenberg, Jemaine Clement, Maya Erskine, Tantoo Cardinal, Tom Waits, Richard E. Grant

title: Wuthering Heights
description: Wuthering Heights is an upcoming Gothic psychological drama film written, directed, and produced by Emerald Fennell based on the 1847 novel by Emily Brontë. It stars Margot Robbie and Jacob Elordi and is scheduled to be theatrically released in the United States by Warner Bros. Pictures on February 13, 2026.
produced_by: Emerald Fennell, Margot Robbie
starring: Margot Robbie, Jacob Elordi, Shazad Latif, Hong Chau, Alison Oliver
